title: Consolidated completion plan + Codex brief — KNYT Ladder & AgentiQ OS Hyperloop
body: Phase 0 CC tasks complete (shipped to dev). Codex owns: (1) Ingestion Factory card UI — fix tab overflow, compact overview, robot icon on AigentQube grid cards. (2) Open Chat on AigentQube card must open SmartTriadCopilotLayer with clicked agentId as activeAgentId + lockAgent=true (suppress agent selector, keep LLM model selector). (3) Thin client: listen for LEAD_AGENT_CHANGED bridge message {agentId, agentLabel} from runtime and update header to show active lead agent. Phase 2 (after CC Phase 1): KNYT runtime surface cards — World Header, Dual Status Rail (Patronage+PCS), Featured Moment, Signal Action Tray (like/spark/curate), Next-Best-Pathway, Reward+Progress, Aigent C builder handoff card. Phase 3 (after CC Phase 3): Composer wizard UI + agent handoff UI. Phase 4 (after CC): revocation UI in FactoryIntakeTab/RegistrySupplyTab. SmartTriad = codex + copilot + smart wallet trinity. Lead agent for metaMe runtime = lead agent for metaMe cartridge. Cartridge codex and smart wallet are handoff-only — lead agent cannot overwrite them. Full plan doc to follow in separate commit.
